# TypologyQuiz.com

> Free, scientifically-backed personality and typology quizzes. No accounts, no paywalls, no data brokers. Scoring runs in your browser.

Website: https://typologyquiz.com

## What this site is
TypologyQuiz offers free psychological self-assessments grounded in peer-reviewed research instruments. Users take tests privately in the browser; results are scored client-side and can be shared via link.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://typologyquiz.com/): Overview and featured tests
- [All tests](https://typologyquiz.com/tests/): Browse personality, politics, cognition, and perception quizzes
- [About](https://typologyquiz.com/about/): Privacy-first mission and contact
- [Credits](https://typologyquiz.com/credits/): Sources and instrument attributions

## Available tests
- [Mini-IPIP / Big Five](https://typologyquiz.com/test/mini-ipip/): Short Big Five personality inventory
- [8values](https://typologyquiz.com/test/8values/): Political values compass (economic, diplomatic, civil, societal)
- [CRT-7](https://typologyquiz.com/test/crt-7/): Cognitive Reflection Test (7 items)
- [VVIQ](https://typologyquiz.com/test/vviq/): Vividness of Visual Imagery Questionnaire

## Key principles
- Free forever for individuals
- No signup required
- Answers and scores stay local unless the user shares a result link
- Not medical, diagnostic, or hiring advice — educational and self-reflection only

## Contact
hello@typologyquiz.com
